title: Better Door Models
description: Just better door models, nothing more
body:
This pack adds internal faces to doors and trapdoors, and removes the hinges from the outer edge.
It uses cursed UV mapping, there are no textures involved, so it can be semi-compatible with resource packs that don't change the shape of the holes.

Also check out [Fancy Doors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-doors) by Zetheon if you prefer 3D handles and such :3 (unaffiliated)
